case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. GOIKE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION NO. 217 HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION NO. 217 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT GOIKE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $514.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,814.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-17-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
